bird.name: Pheasant coucal
bird.summary: The pheasant coucal (Centropus phasianinus) is a species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae. It is found in Australia, Timor and New Guinea.

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: 帝汶島
locations.summary: 帝汶島（印尼語：Pulau Timor，葡萄牙語：Ilha de Timor）是位於馬來群島南端的島嶼，為小巽他群島中面積最大者，總面積約30,777平方公里。該島地處東南亞海域，座標約為9°14′S 124°56′E，北臨弗洛勒斯海，南…

locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

relations.subject: Pheasant coucal
relations.evidence: | title = Geographical variation in the Pheasant Coucal Centropus phasianinus (Latham) and a description of a new subspecies from Timor | doi = 10.1071/MU9840001 | journal = Emu | volume = 84 | pages = 1–15 | year = 1984 | issue = 1 | bibcode = 1984EmuAO..84....1M }} The preferred habitat has dense understory as a component, typically shrubby understory in forest, or tall grasses in grassland or swampy areas, as well as sugar cane in cane plantations and patches of weedy vegetation such as blackberry or lantana
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
